title: SWDC holds programme for its coaches
bodyText:
South Western Districts Cricket (SWDC) hosted a programme to prepare the coaches and captains for the physiological demands of the Cricket SA (CSA) youth national tournaments held on Friday 28 November.


> Nick Venter, the dedicated phycologist facilitator of CSA, presented the session.


The dates for the CSA national youth tournaments:

CSA Girls U16 national tournament: Gqeberha (9-13 December)

CSA Boys U16 national tournament: Paarl (9-13 December)

CSA Girls U19 national tournament: Potchefstroom (15-19 December)

CSA Khaya Majola U19 national tournament: Bloemfontein (16-20 December)

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
